A script to check source files for tab characters and report their presence.

# Purpose
This script is a Tcl executable that checks source files for the presence of tab characters. It iterates over a list of source file names obtained from the `getSourceFileNames` function. For each file, it reads all lines using the `getAllLines` function and checks each line for tab characters using the `regexp` function. If a tab character is found, the script reports the file name and line number with a message indicating that tabs are not allowed. This script is useful for enforcing coding standards related to whitespace usage in source files.
